strategy: Hit with Life (+35%) and avoid Death (35% resist).
Do not cast blades or Globals on yourself; each makes him Hex you (+35% trap on you). Auras are the safe exception.
Do not cast Traps or Shields either; those also draw a +35% Hex on the caster.
Set up with Auras (which do not trigger him) and pet-cast blades (which also do not trigger), then land one Life hit.
At 3,955 health a single blade-and-hit setup ends him fast.
cheatNotes: Casting a blade makes him Hex you with a +35% trap; buff with Auras instead, which do not trigger it.
Globals trigger the Hex but Auras do not, so lean on Auras for setup.
Pet-cast blades do not trigger the Hex; a safe way to gain a blade.
Casting a Trap (even Feint) or a Shield also earns you a +35% Hex; avoid them and burst him.
